about.title: About Us
about.text1: At Veterinaria Vida+ we are dedicated to the comprehensive care of your pet. Our team of professionals has the experience and commitment to provide quality care.
about.text2: Located in Juan Díaz, Ciudad Radial, we are your trusted veterinary clinic with all the services your pet needs under one roof.

testimonials.title: What our clients say
testimonials.t1: Excellent care for my puppy. The doctor is very kind and professional.
testimonials.t2: Fair prices and the grooming service makes my cat look beautiful.
testimonials.t3: The best veterinary clinic in Juan Díaz. Always attentive and caring with pets.

contact.title: Contact & Location
contact.addressText: Juan Díaz, Ciudad Radial, Radiant Plaza, Local 1 & 2
contact.hoursText: Tuesday to Sunday: 9:00 AM - 5:30 PM | Monday: Closed

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: We answer your most common questions
faq.q1Question: Do I need an appointment for a consultation?
faq.q1Answer: We accept walk-ins and appointments. However, we recommend booking via WhatsApp to guarantee immediate attention and reduce wait times.
faq.q2Question: What are the requirements for sterilization?
faq.q2Answer: Your pet must be over 5 months old, fasting for 12 hours, not nursing, and not in heat. The procedure includes general anesthesia and post-operative follow-up.
faq.q3Question: How long does the grooming service take?
faq.q3Answer: Time varies depending on size and coat type. A regular bath takes approximately 1-2 hours, while a bath with grooming can take 2-3 hours.
faq.q4Answer: We handle emergencies during our regular hours, Tuesday to Sunday, 9:00 AM to 5:30 PM. Contact us via WhatsApp for priority attention.
faq.q5Question: Do you have a pickup/delivery service?
faq.q5Answer: We offer transportation service to pick up and deliver your pet. Check availability and rates via WhatsApp.
faq.q6Question: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.q6Answer: We accept cash, debit and credit cards, Yappy, and bank transfers.
